summary.description: High-level summary of the cross-repo change

name.description: Repo identifier matching a name in workspace.json

description.description: Self-contained work description for this repo's pipeline

acceptance_criteria.description: Criteria the repo's changes must satisfy

depends_on.description: Repo names that must complete before this repo starts

skip.description: true if this repo needs no changes for this feature

integration_expectations.description: What the cross-repo integration test should validate
